name: Struts: Unvalidated Action Form
description: A Struts Action Form exists that has no corresponding validation form definition in the Struts Validator configuration, meaning all input from that form bypasses framework validation entirely.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[action_form] exists with no matching validation definition in META[struts_validation_config], so INGRESS[form_data] from that form bypasses CONTROL[struts_validator] entirely and flows directly to TRANSFORM or STORAGE
